name: Attio CRM MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server for Attio — a modern, flexible CRM built for go-to-market teams. Enables AI agents to manage contacts, companies, deals, and sales pipelines in Attio — creating tasks, viewing records, and interacting with the CRM through AI-driven sales and relationship management workflows.
use_cases: Managing contacts and companies in Attio CRM from sales AI agents
Tracking deals and pipeline stages from revenue operations agents
Creating and managing sales tasks from productivity agents
CRM data enrichment and relationship intelligence from go-to-market agents
not_for: Teams not using Attio CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, or Pipedrive users need different servers)
Autonomous CRM modifications without human approval (contact/deal changes have real business impact)
best_when: A sales team using Attio CRM wants AI agents to manage their pipeline — logging contacts, updating deals, tracking tasks — through natural language with Attio's modern, flexible CRM data model.
avoid_when: You use Salesforce, HubSpot, or other CRMs. Attio is a newer player — verify it's your team's actual CRM before deploying.

auth.notes: Attio API key required. Generate from Attio workspace settings under Developer Access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Attio free tier: limited seats and records; paid plans for full access
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and Business plans for teams with more seats and advanced features
pricing.notes: Attio has a free tier. MCP server is free open source from community developer (kesslerio).

performance.rate_limits: Attio API rate limits apply; check Attio API documentation for current limits

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: CRM contacts and deal data contain business PII — handle with data governance
Attio's flexible data model (attributes, records) differs from traditional CRMs — read Attio API docs first
Contact/deal modifications have real business impact — implement human review for write operations
Community server (kesslerio) — verify against current Attio API for compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business contact/deal PII. API key auth. HTTPS. SOC2/GDPR compliant Attio. Implement write approval gates for CRM data modifications.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRM business data. API key auth. GDPR/SOC2 platform. Community server — audit code.
